disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New chest ache and constant racing heart began about 3 days ago, roughly two weeks after recovering from a severe flu-like illness
trigger_question_examples: When did this start and what happened before it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a really bad flu about two weeks ago and got over it, but then a few days ago my chest started aching and my heart's been racing non-stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Resting heart rate is persistently fast (patient counts ~115) and feels racing even at rest, out of proportion to only a mildly raised temperature
trigger_question_examples: Is your heart racing even when you're resting?
Have you been able to check your pulse or temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Even lying still my heart feels like it's pounding — I counted about 115. My temperature was only 37.3 this morning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive breathlessness and severely reduced exercise tolerance — breathless walking to the bathroom, staying in bed
trigger_question_examples: How far can you walk before you get breathless?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can barely walk to the bathroom without gasping. It's been getting worse and I've been staying in bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest ache is variable and slightly worse lying flat, a bit easier sitting up
trigger_question_examples: Does the chest pain change with position or breathing?
Is it worse when you lie down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It aches more when I lie flat and it feels a bit better sitting up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue with a sense of not being able to do anything, in a previously fit young adult
trigger_question_examples: Were you well before the flu?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was really fit before the flu, but now I'm completely wiped out — I can't do anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No crushing or jaw pain, no sweating episodes, no recent long-haul travel or leg swelling on one side
trigger_question_examples: Any crushing pain spreading to the jaw or arm, or heavy sweating?
Any recent long flights or a swollen, painful calf?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No crushing pain or sweating like that, and no long flights or a sore swollen leg.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one able to watch for sudden deterioration
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home with you right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own — there's nobody here with me.
